VAL-BENCH-006.evidence: Created a FRESH benchmark via SubmitPage UI with benchmark mode enabled. Entered 2 URLs (https://example.com and https://example.org), all scenarios and personas selected by default. Clicked 'Start benchmark'. After submission, URL changed to /benchmarks/581b2549-2836-4318-9675-a59e0cf729f3 (NOT /audits/*/run). BenchmarkPage loaded showing 'Comparing 2 URLs' heading, both URLs with progress indicators (example.com 100%, example.org 40% initially), and status 'running'. After ~5s, benchmark completed showing trust scores (100% each), scenario breakdown grid, and unified summary. The field name fix (selected_scenarios/selected_personas) is confirmed working — benchmark creation succeeded without 422 error.

steps.observed: SubmitPage loaded with Benchmark Mode checkbox
Two URL input fields appeared with placeholder text
Shows 'Comparing 2 URLs', both URLs with progress, status 'running' then 'completed'

VAL-BENCH-011.evidence: From completed BenchmarkPage, clicked 'View Report' link for example.com. Navigated to /audits/1a3a601f-978f-4bb5-90f8-39ab766e3748/report?benchmark=581b2549-2836-4318-9675-a59e0cf729f3. ReportPage loaded with 'Back to Benchmark' link visible in the navigation links section (alongside 'Back to run log' and 'Back to History'). Clicked 'Back to Benchmark' link. Successfully returned to /benchmarks/581b2549-2836-4318-9675-a59e0cf729f3. Full round-trip navigation confirmed: BenchmarkPage → ReportPage → BenchmarkPage.

steps.action: Click 'View Report' for example.com on BenchmarkPage
Verify 'Back to Benchmark' link on ReportPage
steps.observed: 'Back to Benchmark' link found in interactive snapshot at ref @e8

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-BENCH-006 (post-submit navigates to BenchmarkPage) confirmed — fresh benchmark created via UI with correct field names, navigated to /benchmarks/{id}. VAL-BENCH-011 (navigation from BenchmarkPage to ReportPage and back) confirmed — View Report link navigates to /audits/{id}/report with benchmark query param, Back to Benchmark link returns to /benchmarks/{id}. No console errors observed.
